text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hooray! Hooray! Hooray, King Ha-lo! Do your
best! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo and I are out training today, but for
whatever reason, our whole session has been
accompanied by Haru Urara's cheering.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...It's peculiar to you, too, isn't it? She's been
doing that nonstop since this morning.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hnngh... King... Good luck getting dressed... I know you can do it... Yawn...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm already dressed... In fact, you're the one
who'd better hurry up and get changed!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Come along! Get that tracksuit off! You're going
to be late.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Pant. Pant. King... Do your best... to get to school!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No, you do your best! You really are going to be late if you don't!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Good luck studying on your break! You're gonna
knock it out of the park!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Urara?! Why have you come to my classroom?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No, hold on a moment—didn't you say you have a
test today?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah! I forgot!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Goodness me... Right, sit next to me! I'll go over
what your test will cover!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...And that's how it's been.
choice_data_list:
Have you done anything that warrants
encouragement?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Not that I'm aware of. There must be some reason
she's doing this, though.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Urara, may I speak with you a moment?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh! King! Is everything okay? Are you taking a
break?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I've got this! You'll be fully rested in no time with
my cheering!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Stop, stop, stop! Whatever is compelling you to
cheer me on this whole time?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's to thank you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
The other day, my teacher said I haven't been
tardy as often and that I've been getting better
scores on my tests too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And when I started thinking about what caused all
that...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I realized it's because you always tell me to do my
best!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So basically, it's thanks to you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Urara...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, I suppose it's fine if—no! In that case, you
must try even harder!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... Yeah, you're right. I've got to if I want to
give you "first-rate" encouragement!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No! That's not what I meant! What I was trying to
say is that, well...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I hereby acknowledge that your spirit is first-rate!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Does that mean you're happy with me?
Yippee!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: With your spirit, yes! But this means you must endeavor to make your conduct first-rate as well!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I see! Okay, got it! I'll do my best since you asked!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You always say the most... unabashedly earnest things...
They just tug at the heartstrings so...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Are you okay?! Your eyes are all wet!
Where does it hurt?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I-it's not what you think! It's just! Um, well...
choice_data_list: There sure is a lot of dust in the air today, huh.
There sure is a lot of dust in the air today, huh.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes! The dust made my nose itchy! That's all it
was!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo hastily tries to explain herself as she
wipes her nose, her expression glowing with
poorly concealed joy.
